case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. YIMI REMBERTO GALDAMEZ BATRES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YIMI REMBERTO GALDAMEZ BATRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BATRES, YIMI REMBERTO GALDAMEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BATRES, YIMI REMBERTO GALDAMEZ
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BATRES, YIMI REMBERTO GALDAMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
